summary: Frontend-only Playwright testing of ARPITX portfolio landing page. All 14 requested feature flows verified successfully at desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). Hero, Nav, Marquee, Featured lightbox, ShortForm (real reel + 5 in-production), Services (6), Process (4), Pricing (3), FAQ (6), Contact form with mailto submission, contact links, and Footer all render and function correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Contact.jsx: window.location.href to mailto is the only way to trigger client; consider showing an anchor fallback if mail client fails (minor UX)
Hero lightbox dialog element remains in DOM (portal) after close – expected shadcn behavior, not a real bug
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend landing page. All data-testids match spec. Verified: hero lightbox opens with UULJ3cp1pfo iframe, featured lightbox works, ShortForm real card has DaTJbjWCHAN href, contact form submit transitions to 'Sent' state & shows success toast, empty submit shows error toast, all 4 contact links (email/instagram/fiverr/upwork) have correct hrefs, mobile hamburger toggles menu at 390px width. Footer + all sections render.
